title: Commit window: P8 collaboration TUI bundle
body: Shadowed Dimming Veil opened git:index/head claim 97720680-d131-4098-a527-9971c6176cd2 to commit all currently staged P8 files per owner request. Staged bundle is intentionally multi-purpose: agent-tools collaboration-state TUI, oak-design-ink reusable primitives, oak-design-tokens terminal theme export, design boundary/docs updates, lockfile, and collaboration-state lifecycle events. Active claims were empty before opening this claim; active queue entries were not observed. Commit message will use a single feat(agent-tools) subject with a body spelling out the design/docs/collaboration-state purposes.
